headline: Built for Totango
subheadline: AI-powered sales infrastructure to optimize customer retention and expansion in your SaaS customer success platform.

challenges.title: Post-Buyout Scaling
challenges.desc: Totango's buyout creates hurdles in scaling sales amid market shifts. This means integrating new operations while maintaining automated workflows. Competitors erode market share if expansion lags.

challenges.title: Customer Retention
challenges.desc: In a competitive SaaS space, Totango struggles to keep customers engaged through automated features. This involves monitoring changes in customer behavior to prevent churn. Revenue growth depends on proactive interventions.

challenges.title: Sales Alignment
challenges.desc: Totango needs to align sales strategies with existing automated workflows for predictable revenue. This requires connecting customer data across systems to drive engagements. Misalignment could hinder long-term value maximization.

challenges.title: Revenue Expansion
challenges.desc: Expanding revenue through customer success is tough for Totango in a crowded market. This includes leveraging AI for better adoption rates. Without effective tools, referrals and upsells fall short.

deliverables.title: AI Sales Workflow System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated sales processes that integrate with Totango's customer success platform to enhance retention

deliverables.title: Customer Expansion Engine
deliverables.desc: Creates tools for identifying expansion opportunities and integrates them with existing workflows to boost revenue

deliverables.title: Retention Optimization Suite
deliverables.desc: Develops predictive analytics to monitor customer health and integrates directly into Totango's platform for proactive engagements

deliverables.title: Sales Scaling Framework
deliverables.desc: Establishes scalable sales infrastructure that aligns with Totango's automated systems to handle post-buyout growth

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Totango's current sales infrastructure and identify key pain points based on your data.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop customized AI solutions that integrate with your platform for better customer outcomes.

engagementSteps.title: Launch and Optimize
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Implement the new systems and refine based on initial performance metrics.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to automate and optimize sales processes for better efficiency.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with Totango?
faqItems.answer: The system connects directly with your customer success platform to enhance workflows.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Based on similar SaaS companies, expect improved retention rates from automated insights.

faqItems.question: Is this customizable?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's tailored to Totango's specific needs like post-buyout scaling.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months, aligned with our structured engagement steps.

faqItems.question: What about costs?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope, but aim for ROI through revenue growth as seen in your 313% growth year.

stackItems.name: Salesforce

stackItems.role: Handles marketing automation to support sales scaling

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Tracks user behavior for customer success insights

stackItems.role: Powers AI models for predictive sales analytics
